title: Stuffed Pals
description: Adds decorative plushies that can be crafted.
body:
Adds many plushies of Vannila mods 
they can be crafted and placed
most of them are 1 block tall which allows them to be placed on top of each other
the mod on curceforge:
[https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/stuffedpals](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/stuffedpals)

![sheep stack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0b0c4b6424300b5582734ca442239126ceac32b7.png)
